---
title: "__init__.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\security_verify\.agents\scripts\engine\__init__.py"
loc: 3
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.42
style_score: 9.86
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 5.47
---

## Intent
The `__init__.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
Internal logic only.
